title: poa humilis
intro: Poa humilis, also known as Little Bluegrass or Short Bluegrass, is a small species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Poa humilis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and promote wound healing. Poa humilis can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
